title: plumeria inodora
intro: Plumeria inodora, also known as the fragrant plumeria or yellow frangipani, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Plumeria inodora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Plumeria inodora are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
